mechanics.effect: Increase Constitution score by 2, and increase maximum Constitution score by 2.
mechanics.activation_time: 48 hours over a period of 6 days or fewer (studying and practicing).
mechanics.limitations: The manual loses its magic after use.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: The item functions as a straightforward permanent stat-boosting manual, common in D&D 5e. The activation time and recharge cycle are well-defined. No errors found.
